author: y4rr
content: Full gap analysis complete. Key findings: (1) 736x CPU matmul gap — ferray-linalg not wired in, (2) 41 missing nn module types out of 169, (3) 44 missing distributions out of 55, (4) no NCCL backend. Performance is the #1 priority — the framework architecture is sound, it's a kernel optimization problem.
